zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley於1393年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley35歲，母親Margaret Despenser29歲。她於大約1417年與Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年7月在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley于1393年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley35岁，母亲Margaret Despenser29岁。她于大约1417年与Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年7月在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley was born in 1393, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Despenser, was 29. She married Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton about 1417, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in July 1458, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley est née en 1393, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Despenser, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton environ 1417, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1458, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley 1393 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Despenser 29. Sie hat um 1417 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1458 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley è nata il nel 1393 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Despenser, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton circa 1417, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1458, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartleyが1393年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartleyは35歳，母Margaret Despenserは29歳であった。約1417年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンでSir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年7月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンで65歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley(이)가 1393년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Despenser(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1417년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 7월 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Stowe-By-Chartley, Staffordshire, Englan: Stowe-by-Chartley, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley nasceu em 1393, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Despenser, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton aproximadamente 1417, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em julho de 1458, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley родилась в 1393 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Despenser, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton около 1417 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла июль 1458 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley nació en 1393, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Despenser, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton aproximadamente 1417, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en julio de 1458, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
